description: This watch from puma comes in a heavy duty design. The assymentric dial and chunky casing gives this watch a tough appearance perfect for navigating the urban jungle.Dial shape: OctagonCase diameter: 32 cmWarranty: 2 YearsMetal case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortTextured rubber straps with a tang clasp for comfort and styleBlack dial with cat logo below 12 hour markTime marked in bold numeralsAnalog dial showing time in hours, minutes and secondsDate aperture at 3 hour markQuartz movement of time displaySolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant upto 50 metres
